title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Backend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
